title: Somwell - Pack of 50 - Large Brown Paper Bags, 16.5 x 10 x 5.5 Inches, Grab & Go Takeaway Bags, Extra Strong Kraft Paper, Ideal for Food, Lunch, Sandwiches, Groceries, Catering & Parties (50, L)
features: FOOD-SAFE KRAFT PAPER BAGS – Made from 70gsm premium food-grade kraft paper, Somwell bags are ideal as paper lunch bags, sandwich bags, bakery bags, snack bags, and popcorn bags.
THREE SIZE OPTIONS – Available in: SMALL – 15 x 6.5 x 30.5 cm | 1.6kg capacity. MEDIUM – 20.4 x 11.5 x 38.1 cm | 4.5kg capacity. LARGE – 25.4 x 14.1 x 41.9 cm | 9.5kg capacity
VARIOUS PACK SIZES – Somwell paper bags are offered in different pack quantities, making them suitable for everyday home use, retail stores, catering services, or bulk orders.

STURDY & PROFESSIONAL DESIGN – Flat-bottom SOS style stands upright for easy filling and folds neatly for storage. Ideal for grocery use, bakery packaging, takeaway meals, gift bags, and retail presentation.
SUSTAINABLE CHOICE – 100% recyclable, compostable, biodegradable, and reusable, Somwell kraft bags are an eco-conscious option for businesses and homes.

MULTIPURPOSE USES – Ideal for cafés, restaurants, bakeries, grocery shops, market stalls, school lunches, office snacks, gift bags, wedding favours, party bags, festivals, craft projects, and eco-friendly packaging solutions.
description: The Somwell Brown Kraft Paper Bags are a premium, eco-friendly choice for food, retail, and everyday packaging. Made from durable 70gsm food-grade kraft paper, they are safe for direct food contact and perfect as paper lunch bags, sandwich bags, bakery bags, grocery bags, and takeaway bags. Their flat-bottom SOS design allows them to stand upright for easy packing, storage, and transport. Available in three practical sizes with generous weight capacity: Small – 15 x 6.5 x 30.5 cm | Holds up to 1.6kg (ideal for sandwiches, sweets, snacks, and lunch portions) Medium – 20.4 x 11.5 x 38.1 cm | Holds up to 4.5kg (perfect for bakery goods, groceries, and takeaway meals) Large – 25.4 x 14.1 x 41.9 cm | Holds up to 9.5kg (great for retail shopping, catering, parties, and bulkier items) Choose from various pack sizes to suit both home use and commercial use. Somwell kraft bags are 100% recyclable, reusable, biodegradable, and compostable, making them a sustainable and stylish packaging option. Strong, reliable, and versatile, they are perfect for cafés, bakeries, restaurants, takeaways, grocery shops, retail stores, market stalls, weddings, parties, festivals, and craft projects.
